author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ @here Couple of updates: ATLAS now properly gets airdropped to new accounts created in C4 PTR , If you were missing ATLAS in PTR, you should now have it in your account inventory , Cultivation Claims should now be properly working in Faction Claims, producing R4 ,
content: @here  Couple of updates: ATLAS now properly gets airdropped to new accounts created in C4 PTR,If you were missing ATLAS in PTR, you should now have it in your account inventory,Cultivation Claims should now be properly working in Faction Claims, producing R4,
